ogTitle: Collombatti vs Collum Collum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Collombatti and Collum Collum.
heading: Collombatti vs Collum Collum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Collombatti, New South Wales and Collum Collum, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Collum Collum has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Collombatti (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Collombatti or Collum Collum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Collombatti has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Collum Collum scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Collombatti scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Collum Collum scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Collombatti or Collum Collum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Collum Collum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
